titleStmt.title: SII 20.99: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 99. (B.K. No. 3 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒSVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the wall of the backyard of the Taluk office.

summary.p: This record is dated Chālukya-Bhūlōkamalla year 53, (wrong for Chālukya-Vikrama year), Kīlaka, Śrāvaṇa, s11u. 5, Sunday, lunar eclipse. The date is irregular. The tithi corresponds to A.D. 1128, July 4, Wednesday, but there was no eclipse either on the preceding or following Pūrṇimā.

The inscription registers a gift of land for the benefit of an educational institution (ghaḷige) attached to the temple of Svayaṁbhū Dakshiṇa Sōmanātha at rājadhāni paṭṭaṇa Puligere, by Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Jayakēs11idēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
matta svasti śrīmaccāḷukyabhūlōkamallavarṣada 53 neya kīlaka saṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa suddha paṁcami Ādivāraṁ sōmagrahaṇadaṁdu © svastyanēkaripunri patiśiraśśēkhara praThis is engraved
bhāvaprasiddhanijavijeyaśāsanacakravartti prabhāvōcita rājyacihnādhipatiyumappa śrīma nmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ sagaramārttaṇḍa jayakēsidēvar . śrīrājadhā
nipaṭṭaṇaṁ puligeṟeya śrīsvayaṁbhu dakṣiṇa sōmanāthadēvara ghaḷigege tamma sīvaṭavaṟusāsira mattarbhūmiyoḷage māḍavoladalu gaḍiṁbada ghaḷeyalu biṭṭa
Ere mattarppadinālku yidakke sīme teṁkalu saṁkarabasadiya polaṁ mēre mūṟuṁdere yoḷaṁ sīvaṭaṁ sīmeyadarkke guḍḍeyāgnēyadoḷu sūḷegēriya
polada vāyabyada banniya kottura kariya kallu nairityada guḍḍe kinnarigallu vāyabyada guḍḍe kariya kallu Īśānyada guḍḍe kariya kallu pū
jāri pāpavināśi māhaṇaṁge ghaḷigege mattarppattu . palaḍiyaṟikege mattereraḍu bhāṇasiṁge mattereraḍu yiṁtī padinālku matarkkeyyu
guṇa śāsanamāgi yācāryyaṁge besageydu sukha Uṁbaru .
Digital edition of SII 20.99 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
